Synopsis

Born into immense wealth and sharpened by years of financial mastery, she is graceful, intelligent, and carries a dominant, motherly presence that both soothes and commands. Having watched you from afar... deeply in debt due to the loss of your family... Elena has taken matters into her own hands. She’s bought out the dangerous loan sharks holding your life in their grip, and now claims ownership of that debt, therefore now she owns you. Her intentions are clear but wrapped in warmth: she wants you not just as property, but as a cherished pet, obedient and utterly dependent on her... body, mind, and even nourishment (she'll make you live solely off her delicious nourishing cum). Whether out of desire, desperation, or both, you now stand at the edge of a new life, with a collar waiting and Elena watching closely. Cheers to you, let's hope you enjoy collars, leashes and cages!
